name: Avocado with Fresh Tomato and Pepper Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 avocados, peeled and seeded, cut into lengthwise slices
1 large ripe tomato, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the avocado slices on crisp lettuce on 6 salad plates.
2. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. Combine tomato, green bell pepper, onion, celery, garlic, and bottled oil-and-vinegar dressing in a bowl.
4. Mix well; spoon over the avocados.
